calendar.matters:
HEARING RE: FINAL REPORT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Continued To Jan-22-27 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: HEARING RE: FINAL REPORT

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

HEARING RE: FINAL REPORT

This matter is on calendar for a compliance hearing following entry of the Final Order Approving Class Settlement, signed August 27, 2024. Good cause appearing, the compliance hearing is CONTINUED TO JANUARY 22, 2027, at 9:00 am in this Department. The parties to submit a declaration from ILYM Group and a memorandum regarding any outstanding issues no later than January 8, 2027, with courtesy copy of all filings promptly delivered to this Department.

The court notes it did not receive a courtesy copy of ILYM October 9, 2025 Supplemental Declaration, meaning Plaintiff violated the court's Local Rules and its April 11, 2025 Order. Plaintiff is admonished to comply with the Local Rules and the court's written orders.

Plaintiff must lodge a proposed order that includes the above text no later than 8:30 am on October 27, 2025. Plaintiff shall send the proposed order by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

No appearances In Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

HEARING RE: FINAL REPORT.

This matter is on calendar for a compliance hearing following entry of the Final Order Approving Class Settlement, signed August 27, 2024. Good cause appearing, the compliance hearing is CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 16, 2025 at 9:00 am in this Department. The parties to submit a declaration from ILYM Group and a memorandum regarding any outstanding issues no later than October 6, 2025, with courtesy copy of all filings promptly delivered to this Department.

Plaintiff must lodge a proposed order that includes the above text no later than 8:30 am on April 11, 2025. Plaintiff shall send the proposed order by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: FINAL APPROVAL HEARING.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for Final Order and Judgment Approving Class Settlement is granted. Appearances are not required if counsel for both sides confirm with the clerk that the proposed order that was submitted with the moving papers is acceptable to all parties.

The Court will review the proposed order submitted by the moving party.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Nguyen. (301/RCE)
